items: If you have public comment related to a study session item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Update on Workforce Housing at 750 Bradford Street

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Items 10.5, 10.6, and 10.7 (three measure U's) were moved to consent. Items 10.3 and 10.4 were also moved to consent.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Moving right along to the bond program consent items. Recommendation regarding approval of bundle program consent items.
